keyword_rules: there should be more than one owner assigned to subscriptions
a maximum of 3 owners should be designated for subscriptions
guest accounts with write permissions on azure resources should be removed
disabled accounts with owner permissions on azure resources should be removed
notes: Mapped to Defender identity and subscription-ownership hygiene recommendations.

keyword_rules: internet-facing virtual machines should be protected with network security groups
non-internet-facing virtual machines should be protected with network security groups
notes: Mapped to Defender perimeter and exposure recommendations for virtual machines.

keyword_rules: all network ports should be restricted on network security groups associated to your virtual machine
notes: Mapped to Defender recommendations about open network ports and permissive NSG posture.

keyword_rules: system updates should be installed on your machines
notes: Mapped to Defender recommendations for patching and update posture.

keyword_rules: endpoint protection solution should be installed on virtual machines
endpoint protection solution should be installed on virtual machine scale sets
notes: Mapped to Defender endpoint protection coverage recommendations.

keyword_rules: vulnerabilities in security configuration on your linux machines should be remediated
vulnerabilities in security configuration on your windows machines should be remediated
notes: Mapped to Defender guest-configuration and hardening recommendations.

keyword_rules: microsoft defender for servers should be enabled
microsoft defender for sql should be enabled
microsoft defender for storage should be enabled
notes: Mapped to Defender plan-enablement recommendations that align with monitoring and security coverage.
